seo.title: The Methodology | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's seven-step architectural process for partner selection, courtship, family guidance and post-marital support.

hero.title: Not a funnel. A seven-part architecture.
hero.description: A private, living process that evolves as two people move from consideration to commitment, and as two families learn to move together.

steps.label: Foundation · Selection
steps.title: Personalised Partner Selection
steps.description: We begin beyond the checklist. Personality, patterns, priorities, preferences, family dynamics and the life each person is actually building become the basis for a highly considered search.

steps.label: Composition · Curation
steps.title: Profile Presentation
steps.description: Only carefully selected possibilities are presented. We consider mental, emotional, intellectual and social alignment, then offer the context required to see the person rather than merely scan a profile.

steps.label: Observation · Reassessment
steps.title: Compatibility Reassessment
steps.description: Once two individuals connect, theory gives way to lived chemistry. We reassess organic compatibility, observing the ease, curiosity and priorities emerging between them.

steps.label: Dialogue · Counsel
steps.title: Courtship Counselling
steps.description: Alpa creates a confidential space for honest conversation: how each person gives and receives care, handles difference, defines partnership and recognises whether their needs are truly being met.

steps.label: Readiness · Clarity
steps.title: Pre-Marital Counselling
steps.description: Before celebration comes clarity. Bride and groom explore rights, responsibilities, emotional labour, personal ambition, finances, boundaries and the expectations that shape everyday married life.

steps.label: Integration · Family
steps.title: Family Guidance
steps.description: We work thoughtfully with both families to create mutual respect, navigate the wedding process and establish the deeper understanding upon which long-term family integration depends.

steps.label: Continuity · First year
steps.title: Post-Marital Support
steps.description: For up to one year, HeartLink remains close. We support the couple through personal, professional and social transitions, helping a new marriage find its own confident rhythm.

closing.title: One relationship. One continuous line of counsel.
closing.description: You are never passed from sales to matching to support. Context is preserved, judgment compounds and confidentiality remains intact.
